description: Clean a CRM customer contacts export by fixing schema drift, normalizing names, emails, customer segments, and signup dates, then validating and publishing a warehouse-ready contacts table.

validation_rules.required_fields_present: All required customer contact fields are populated.
validation_rules.schema_matches: The cleaned table matches the published customer contacts schema.
validation_rules.dates_canonical: Signup dates use the canonical YYYY-MM-DD format.
validation_rules.emails_valid: Emails are syntactically valid and contain no spaces.
